mapper.select: SELECT FROM InvoiceLine ORDER BY InvoiceLineId OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO InvoiceLine (InvoiceId, TrackId, UnitPrice, Quantity) VALUES (#{invoiceId}, #{trackId}, #{unitPrice}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM InvoiceLine WHERE InvoiceId = #{invoiceId} ORDER BY InvoiceLineId
